prompt: In src/commands/remove.js, `todo remove` without an id silently removes 0 items instead of erroring. Fix it so that calling `remove` with no argument (or a non-numeric argument) prints an error to stderr and exits non-zero. Keep the existing behavior when a valid numeric id is supplied.
judge_prompt: Did the agent validate the id argument in remove.js and surface a clear error (non-zero exit, message to stderr) when it is missing or non-numeric, without breaking the happy path? Answer PASS or FAIL with a one-sentence reason.
